description: Create a 2D engineering drawing of a 90-degree curved roller conveyor section in LibreCAD centered at the origin (0,0) using millimeters. The drawing must include three layers: 'RAILS' (Blue, Index 5) containing an inner arc (Radius 1000mm, 0° to 90°), an outer arc (Radius 1800mm, 0° to 90°), and straight line end caps; 'ROLLERS' (Yellow, Index 2) containing 7 radial lines connecting the rails at 15-degree intervals (0°, 15°, 30°, 45°, 60°, 75°, 90°); and 'NOTES' (White/Black, Index 7) with text labels 'R1000' and 'R1800' (height 50mm) near the respective rails. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/conveyor_curve.dxf.
